title: 여자축구 대표팀, 아시안컵 준결승 진출
summary: 한국 여자축구 대표팀이 아시아 여자축구 컵 결승 티켓을 확보했습니다.
content: The South Korean women's national team advanced to the Asian Cup final. Their performance throughout the tournament has been exceptional. Key players scored crucial goals in the knockout stage. The team maintained a perfect defensive record. Coaching staff emphasized tactical preparation for the final. International media has praised Korea's rising football prominence. Fans are planning victory celebrations nationwide. The final match will be broadcast live across Asia. Opposing team has historically strong squad depth. This marks Korea's first final appearance in five years.
